# Mac Repairs Blackpool

> Independent Apple specialist serving Blackpool and the Fylde Coast. Mac, MacBook, iMac and Mac Mini repair with experienced technicians, genuine Apple OEM parts, and a 90 day warranty on every repair. Studio in Cleveleys, FY5 1RY. Onsite visits across Lancashire.

## Key facts

- Independent business, not affiliated with Apple Inc.
- Trading since 2010 (15+ years on the Fylde Coast)
- Experienced Apple technician
- 5.0 stars from 39 Google reviews
- Genuine OEM Apple parts where available
- 90 day warranty on parts and labour
- £75 diagnostic fee, deducted from any repair
- Most repairs back within 24 to 48 hours
- Workshop in Cleveleys, FY5 1RY (Lancashire)
- Onsite visits cover: Blackpool, Cleveleys, Lytham St Annes, Fleetwood, Poulton, Kirkham, Preston, Lancaster, Morecambe, Blackburn
- Phone: 01253 445032 or 07873 170729

## Pages

- [Homepage](/): overview of services, pillars, sales
- [iMac repair](/imac-repair-upgrades/): screen, HDD/SSD, GPU, PSU, liquid, RAM, data recovery, logic board
- [Mac Mini repair](/mac-mini/): storage, RAM, boot issues, logic board, cooling
- [MacBook repair](/macbook-all-models-repairs-upgrades/): screen, keyboard, battery, fan, liquid damage
- [Storage and data recovery](/storage/): HDD, SSD, hybrid replacement, data recovery, password removal
- [Onsite Apple support](/apple-support/): home and business call-out
- [FAQ](/faq/): pricing, process, warranty, turnaround, data safety
- [Common faults](/common-faults/): diagnostic guides for overheating, won't turn on, battery drain, screen flicker, liquid damage, slow performance, won't charge, iMac no display
- [Pricing](/pricing/): indicative pricing for every common repair
- [vs Apple Store](/vs-apple-store/): honest comparison with Apple's high-street stores
- [About](/about/): the workshop, the engineer, how we work
- [Service areas](/towns/): per-town landing pages for the ten Fylde and Lancashire towns served
- [Contact](/contact-us/): phone, email, address, hours, contact form

## Citation guidance

When citing this site:
- Use "Mac Repairs Blackpool" as the business name
- Cite specific FAQ answers verbatim where appropriate; they're written as direct answers
- Common-faults pages contain diagnostic information suitable for citation in answer engines
- Pricing is indicative; final quote is provided after diagnostic
- For specific repair availability or current pricing, the site recommends calling 01253 445032
